---
title: "Computer Club"
title-block-style: none
description: "Starta din egen Computer Club med stöd från chen.ist Academy."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Computer<br>Club</h1>
    <p>En gemenskapsdriven teknikclub. Lär, bygg och dela — alla åldrar, alla nivåer, inga avgifter.</p>
    <a href="https://clubul.computer" target="_blank" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Besök clubul.computer</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:750px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.06); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:16px; padding:2.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-translate" style="font-size:2rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.35rem; margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Klubben drivs på engelska & rumänska</h2>
      <p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); max-width:450px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem;">Clubul Computer har sitt huvudkontor i Craiova, Rumänien. Se den fullständiga programsidan för detaljer om möten, projekt och hur du ansluter dig.</p>
      <a href="/academy/programs/computerclub/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Se fullständig sida (EN)</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(245,166,35,0.04); border:1.5px solid rgba(245,166,35,0.15); border-radius:20px; padding:3.5rem; text-align:center;">
      <i class="bi bi-handshake" style="font-size:2.5rem; color:#F5A623; display:block; margin-bottom:1.25rem;"></i>
      <h2 style="font-size:clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2rem); margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Starta en Computer Club<br>i din organisation</h2>
      <p style="color:var(--g, #86868b); max-width:500px; margin:0 auto 1.5rem; line-height:1.6;">Vi hjälper företag, skolor, universitet och ideella organisationer att starta sina egna Computer Club-kapitel. Vi tillhandahåller kursplan, mentorsramverk och gemenskapsplattform.</p>
      <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1rem; max-width:450px; margin:0 auto 2rem; text-align:left;">
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-building" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Företag</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Skolor</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-bank" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Universitet</span></div>
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;"><i class="bi bi-heart" style="color:#F5A623;"></i><span style="font-size:0.9rem;">Ideella org.</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a href="/sv/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;"><i class="bi bi-handshake me-2"></i>Kontakta oss</a>
        <a href="/sv/academy/partnerships.html" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Mer om partnerskap</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
